codeQuality.comments: Clean implementation following CLI patterns. Proper use of commander.js with JSON output support. Good error handling for git repo requirement.

VAL-M2-INIT-001.notes: maestro mission init creates .maestro/ and .maestro/missions/ directories correctly

VAL-M2-INIT-002.notes: Init is idempotent - second init succeeds without error

VAL-M2-INIT-003.notes: Init with --json returns structured output with initialized/alreadyInitialized status
